text:
The first search result (index 1) confirms the exact dataset page. The URL matches exactly, and the page title is "KisanVaani/agriculture-qa-english-only · Datasets at Hugging Face." The dataset owner/creator is KisanVaani, not "Hugging Face" — Hugging Face is the platform hosting it. The cited reference correctly identifies KisanVaani as the author/organization.

The automated checker's "author mismatch" is a false positive. KisanVaani is the dataset creator/owner (the correct cited author), while Hugging Face is merely the hosting platform. This is a metadata interpretation error by the checker, not a hallucination or error in the citation.

EXPLANATION: The dataset "Agriculture-qa" by KisanVaani exists on Hugging Face and is correctly cited. The checker's flagged author mismatch is incorrect—KisanVaani is the dataset creator, not Hugging Face, which is merely the hosting platform.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/datasets/KisanVaani/agriculture-qa-english-only

FOUND_AUTHORS: KisanVaani
